videos.title: Meet the Climate Minister With Me! Parliament Vlog and Climate Education Interview
videos.description:
Hi besties!! Well, this is crazy?? Come meet the Climate Minister Katie White OBE with me in Parliament to discuss all things climate education 🌱📚

For transparency, I had to submit my questions in advance and share all answers with the team first. We also discussed some matters that I wasn't allowed to film! Overall though, the team were super lovely and open to hearing what I had to say which I'm super grateful for.
